summary: Comprehensive testing of EYESAP Technology website completed successfully. All backend APIs functional, frontend UI working correctly, admin functionality operational, and contact form integrated properly.
passed_tests: Blog CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Homepage loading with all sections (hero, stats, services, why-us, CTA)
Navigation bar with services dropdown functionality
Page routing for all 5 main sections (Home, About, SAP Implementation, SAP Staffing, SAP Training)
Blogs page with 3 seeded blog posts
Contact page with working form submission
Admin dashboard with blog management interface
